controls.description: Full acquisition chain, drive electronics powered, coil disconnected at driver output; characterizes instrument coherence baseline b_w and phase drift.
Coils energized at identical settings with no crystal present; isolates drive pickup (JH-033 artifact class).
Resistor dummy load replacing coil pair; separates switching transients from field effects.
Known weak tone injected at sensor input to establish the coherence detection limit (KOS-10 test consequence; H-14 prerequisite).
Active/no-specimen/dummy run order drawn from a seeded RNG before each session.

notes: Example instance for control_matrix.schema.json; the full per-branch matrix lives in experiments/controls/CONTROL_MATRIX.md + control_matrix.example.json.
